controls.title: Container Images and Build File Configuration: non-root user, healthchecks, pinned base images, no secrets in Dockerfiles

notAssessable.title: Host Configuration
notAssessable.reason: Host hardening is assessed on the live Docker host, not in build files.

notAssessable.title: Docker Daemon Configuration
notAssessable.reason: Daemon flags and TLS settings are runtime host configuration.

notAssessable.title: Docker Daemon Configuration Files
notAssessable.reason: File ownership and permissions exist only on the live host.

notAssessable.title: Container Runtime Configuration
notAssessable.reason: Runtime flags (--privileged, mounts, namespaces) are how containers are RUN, not built; not visible in a Dockerfile.

notAssessable.title: Docker Security Operations
notAssessable.reason: Image sprawl and patching cadence are operational practices.
